hooks.command: command -v monition >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; d="${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/monition"; mkdir -p "$d"; monition fire-hook 2>>"$d/hook-errors.log" || true
command -v monition >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; d="${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/monition"; mkdir -p "$d"; monition session-brief 2>>"$d/hook-errors.log" || true
command -v monition >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; d="${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/monition"; mkdir -p "$d"; monition prompt-hook 2>>"$d/hook-errors.log" || true
